name: softjunk-lead-kit
description: Dependency-free local CLI and MCP checkout tools for the SoftJunk 5 USD PayPal lead follow-up handoff.

scripts.cli:smoke: node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js doctor --json && node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js kit --json && node bin/softjunk-lead-kit.js pay --mode kit --json
